articles.title_en: ASEAN countries shown interest in Russian monitoring systems
articles.lead_en: The Russian experience shows that the ERA-GLONASS system reduces the number of casualties in serious accidents by alerting emergency services in a timely manner, GLONASS CEO Alexey Raikevich stressed
articles.title_raw: ASEAN countries shown interest in Russian monitoring systems
articles.lead_raw: The Russian experience shows that the ERA-GLONASS system reduces the number of casualties in serious accidents by alerting emergency services in a timely manner, GLONASS CEO Alexey Raikevich stressed
